# terrible_cisco_mso_mso_schema_template_contract_filter (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `contract` (String) The name of the contract to manage.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `schema` (String) The name of the schema.
- `template` (String) The name of the template.

### Optional

- `action` (String) The filter action parameter is supported on versions of MSO/NDO that are 3.3 or greater.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `contract_display_name` (String) The name as displayed on the MSO web interface. This defaults to the contract name when unset on creation.
- `contract_filter_type` (String) DEPRECATION WARNING, contract_filter_type will not be used anymore and is deduced from filter_type. The type of filters defined in this contract. This defaults to `both-way` when unset on creation.
- `contract_scope` (String) The scope of the contract. This defaults to `vrf` when unset on creation.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of contract is supported on versions of MSO/NDO that are 3.3 or greater.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `filter` (String) The filter to associate with this contract.
- `filter_directives` (String) A list of filter directives.
- `filter_schema` (String) The schema name in which the filter is located.
- `filter_template` (String) The template name in which the filter is located.
- `filter_type` (String) The type of filter to manage. Prior to MSO/NDO 3.3 remove and re-apply contract to change the filter type.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `priority` (String) The filter priority override parameter is supported on versions of MSO/NDO that are 3.3 or greater.
- `qos_level` (String) The Contract QoS Level parameter is supported on versions of MSO/NDO that are 3.3 or greater.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `present` or `absent` for adding or removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
